untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'price deviation from estimated fundamental value' (1.0% threshold) and 'liquidity demand/unusual spread behavior.' No indicator in the allowed set directly measures fundamental value estimation, spread behavior, or microstructure liquidity demand. Pivot point used as proxy for mean reversion reference, but this is an approximation. The core concept of identifying uninformed trader liquidity demands cannot be accurately expressed with technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Translated CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction by creating both entry_long and entry_short conditions. Used pivot as a proxy for fundamental value reference since true fundamental value estimation is unavailable. Used vol_ratio_20 > 1.2 as proxy for unusual volume/liquidity behavior. Stop loss set to 0.75% as specified. Hold period set to 2 bars as per exit conditions.
